snippet: This is a regional allocation of funding, determined by each of the 4 regional offices, to support alternative programs for students. Where these funds are to be used by schools for salaries on eduPay, schools may need (depending on their overall budget surplus situation) to undertake a cash-to-credit transfer to offset the payroll charge-out. Funding is calculated at the Indicative cycle and may be updated at the Confirmed cycle. Funding is allocated through cash funding. Ancillary Settings Teachers (Reference 4...
